login.title: Sign in to Orion
login.sub: Welcome back. Pick a sign-in method to continue.
login.devBypassBanner: Dev-bypass auth is active. Sign-in inputs are ignored — click "Sign in" to enter as the configured dev user.

errors.popupBlocked: Pop-up was blocked. Allow pop-ups and try again.
errors.generic: Could not sign in. Try again.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.comingSoon: Account self-service is coming soon. Ask your team owner to send you an invite.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.comingSoon: Password recovery is coming soon. Reach out to support to reset your password.

onboarding.title: Create your company
onboarding.sub: Just a few details so we can set up your workspace.

helpers.subdomainDerivation: Used in your tenant URL. We derive it from the company name — feel free to override.

validation.subdomainSlug: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
validation.subdomainTaken: This subdomain is already in use.

acceptInvite.title: You're invited
acceptInvite.body: You've been invited to join {companyName} as {roleName}.

errors.invalid: This invite is no longer valid.
errors.alreadyAccepted: This invite has already been accepted.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.sub: Here's your operation overview for today, {month} {day}.

pipeline.title: Production pipeline
pipeline.sub: Where your pieces are right now
pipeline.footer: On average a piece takes 7.2 days from order to delivery.

needsAction.title: Needs your attention
needsAction.sub: {count, plural, =0 {No pending items} one {# pending item} other {# pending items}}

since.hours: {count, plural, one {# hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
since.days: {count, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.sub: {count, plural, =0 {No actions yet} one {Latest action} other {Latest # actions}}

list.title: Orders
list.sub: Track every order from every channel in one place.

empty.title: No orders yet
empty.body: Create your first order or wait for a channel webhook to drop one in.

actions.confirmDelete: Delete this order? This cannot be undone.

title.newSub: Register a manual order across any channel.
title.editSub: Adjust price, date or external code.

form.noVariations: No variations available for this ad.

validation.pricePositive: Price must be zero or greater

toasts.deleteBlocked: This order already shipped — stock has moved.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to orders.

list.title: Import
list.sub: Drop a PDF or CSV and let the AI extract orders. You confirm every field before they hit the catalog.

dropzone.title: Drop the file here
dropzone.body: Drag a payment receipt or a sales CSV. We will parse it and let you review the rows before saving.
dropzone.acceptedTypes: PDF or CSV — up to 5 MB
dropzone.errorType: Only PDF and CSV files are accepted.

preview.title: Parsed orders
preview.editHint: Click any cell to edit before saving.
preview.empty: No rows left to import. Go back and pick another file.

commit.title: Confirm import
commit.body: Save {count, plural, one {# order} other {# orders}}? Each row will become a real order in the catalog.
commit.errorSomeFailed: Some rows could not be saved.

errors.generic: Some rows could not be imported.
errors.parseFailed: We could not parse this file. Try another one.
errors.parseEmpty: The parser did not find any orders in this file.

toasts.parseSuccess: Found {count, plural, one {# order} other {# orders}} to review.
toasts.commitSuccess: {count, plural, one {# order imported} other {# orders imported}}.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to import orders.

list.title: Clients
list.sub: Directory of clients across all channels.

empty.title: No clients yet
empty.body: Track every buyer in one place — start by adding your first client.

actions.confirmDelete: Delete this client? This cannot be undone.

list.title: Ads
list.sub: Manage product listings across ecommerces and social channels.

empty.title: No ads yet
empty.body: Publish your first ad to start tracking listings across channels.

actions.confirmDelete: This ad will be removed. This cannot be undone.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to ads.

title.newSub: Publish a listing on an ecommerce or social channel

hints.externalIdOptional: Optional — leave blank if the channel doesn't assign a code.

list.title: Products
list.sub: Combinations of tech spec + print, organized by size and color.

empty.title: No products yet
empty.body: Create your first product to start linking specs and prints.

variations.title: Variations
variations.body: Each cell becomes a SKU. Drop a combination to remove it.
variations.noPreview: Pick at least one size and one color to preview SKUs.

actions.confirmDelete: Delete this product? This cannot be undone.

placeholders.name: e.g. Cropped Oversized
placeholders.searchSpec: Search spec by code or name…
placeholders.searchPrint: Search print by code or name…

validation.variationsRequired: Pick at least one size and one color
validation.duplicatePair: A product already exists for this spec + print combination.

list.title: Tech specs
list.sub: Production recipes: fabric, grammage, ribana and CMT cost.

empty.title: No specs yet
empty.body: Specs describe how a product is made. Create your first to start cutting and sewing.

actions.noResults: No specs match the current filters.

validation.ribanaPctRequired: Inform the % weight of the ribana when “uses ribana” is on.
validation.duplicateCode: This code is already in use.
validation.linkedProducts: Cannot delete: products are using this spec.

list.title: Prints
list.sub: Catalog of applied artwork — DTF, silk, sublimation.

empty.title: No prints yet
empty.body: Add your first artwork to start linking it to products.

actions.confirmDelete: Delete this print? This cannot be undone.

helpers.imageUrl: Paste the public URL of the final artwork.

list.title: Cutting
list.sub: Plan and record cutting batches against your fabric rolls.
list.noResults: No cutting orders matched your search.

empty.title: No cutting orders yet
empty.body: Plan a batch against a fabric roll to start tracking cutting.

actions.confirmDelete: The cutting order will be deleted. This cannot be undone.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to cutting orders.

title.newSub: Plan a new batch against a fabric roll

hints.cutAtOptional: Leave blank to keep the order pending.

validation.rollsDiffer: Rib roll must be different from body roll

list.title: Shipments
list.sub: Track shipments sent to and received from sewing workshops.

empty.title: No shipments yet
empty.body: Send your first batch of cut pieces to a sewing workshop.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to shipments.

receive.title: Receive shipment
receive.description: Record how many pieces came back per size.

title.newSub: Send cut pieces to a sewing workshop

validation.atLeastOneSize: At least one size must have a piece

empty.title: No workshops yet
empty.body: Register your first sewing partner to start tracking shipments.

actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.

placeholders.name: e.g. Banca Dona Lúcia
placeholders.address: e.g. R. das Palmeiras, 120 — São Paulo, SP

validation.duplicateName: A workshop with this name already exists

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to workshops.

list.title: Rolls
list.sub: Every roll received and how much remains. Balance is decremented at each cut.

empty.title: No rolls registered yet
empty.body: Register your first incoming roll to start tracking fabric balance.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by supplier, color or fabric type…

actions.confirmDelete: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
actions.confirmDeleteBody: The roll will be permanently removed.

detail.consumersEmpty: No cut has been registered against this roll yet.

validation.initialWeightPositive: Initial weight must be greater than zero
validation.currentExceedsInitial: Current weight cannot exceed initial weight
validation.pricePositive: Price must be zero or greater
validation.deletionBlocked: Cannot delete — this roll is referenced by a cutting order.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to fabric rolls.

empty.title: No stock registered yet
empty.body: Entries appear when a sewing shipment is received or you record a manual adjustment.

preview.lowWarning: After this exit the SKU will be in shortage.

validation.quantityPositive: Quantity must be greater than zero

movements.title: Movements
movements.sub: Every entry and exit, ordered from newest.

fallback.forbidden: You don't have access to stock.

list.title: Reports
list.sub: Cross-reference sales, production, inventory and cost data.

list.title: Settings
list.sub: Configure your account, team, integrations, and how you want to be notified.

company.title: Company identity
company.sub: How your company appears for the team and on documents.

helpers.subdomainImmutable: Cannot be changed in this version.
helpers.colorAppliedTo: Appears in the sidebar, on primary buttons, and on PDF reports.

dangerZone.title: Critical zone
dangerZone.sub: Actions that affect all of the company's data.

export.title: Export all data
export.body: Orders, tech specs, stock and movements — CSV format.

delete.title: Delete company
delete.body: Removes all data after 30 days. This action is irreversible.

profile.title: Your profile
profile.sub: This information is visible to your teammates.

helpers.roleImmutable: Ask an admin to change your role.

empty.title: Coming soon
empty.body: This section will launch in a future release.

integrations.title: Integrations — coming soon
integrations.body: Connect Orion to your shop, marketplace, and accounting tools.

notifications.title: Notifications — coming soon
notifications.body: Configure how you and your team get alerts from Orion.

hero.body: You're part of the early group — billing isn't enabled yet. When it is, we'll let you know well in advance.

usage.title: Team usage
usage.sub: Members with access to your account
usage.remaining: {count, plural, one {# seat left} other {# seats left}} on this account.
usage.limitReached: Limit reached — get in touch to unlock more seats.

forbidden.company: You don't have access to company settings.
forbidden.members: You don't have access to members.
forbidden.roles: You don't have access to roles.

list.title: Members
list.sub: Everyone with access to this company.

empty.title: No members yet
empty.body: Send your first invite to onboard your team.

actions.confirmRemove: Remove this member? They will lose access immediately.

form.title: Invite member
form.sub: We will send the invite link to this email.

toasts.duplicate: There is already a pending invite for this email.

list.title: Roles & permissions
list.sub: What each role can read or write.

list.title: Audit log
list.sub: Every change to your data, with who, when, and what.

empty.title: No audit entries match

home.title: Welcome to Orion
home.subtitle: Pick a section from the sidebar to get started.
